company.name: Northstar Digital
company.description: Security consulting and managed assessment services

assessment.title: Customer Services Portal Security Assessment
assessment.description: Application security assessment of the customer portal.

branding.reportFooterText: © 2026 Northstar Digital. Confidential - do not distribute.

selectedThreats.title: Missing Server-Side Authorization
selectedThreats.description: The endpoint returns order data without verifying that the authenticated user owns the requested object.
selectedThreats.impact: An authenticated attacker can access another customer's order information.
selectedThreats.recommendation: Apply object-level authorization to every request and deny access by default.
selectedThreats.observation: The API accepted a tampered identifier and returned a different customer's order details.
selectedThreats.risk: Sensitive customer data is exposed to any authenticated user.

selectedThreats.title: Verbose Error Messages
selectedThreats.description: Unhandled errors expose internal implementation details to the client.
selectedThreats.impact: Attackers can use the leaked details to improve later attacks.
selectedThreats.recommendation: Return generic client-facing errors and log detailed diagnostics only on the server.
selectedThreats.observation: Stack traces and SQL fragments were visible in the response body during error handling.
selectedThreats.risk: Implementation details can be used for targeted exploitation.

selectedEvidence.title: Authorization bypass proof
selectedEvidence.description: Captured the customer record returned for a tampered identifier.
selectedEvidence.content: Response body showing another customer's order details.

selectedEvidence.title: Reproduction notes
selectedEvidence.description: Step-by-step notes from the manual test session.
selectedEvidence.content: GET /api/v1/orders/123 returned data for a different customer account.
